summary: Software Engineer with 2+ years of experience at Accenture, specializing in building scalable and high-performance web applications. Strong expertise in Angular and modern JavaScript (ES6+), with hands-on experience in React. Experienced in developing complex user flows, debugging production issues, and improving system reliability for enterprise e-commerce platforms. Proven track record of increasing unit test coverage from 5% to 90% and delivering high-impact fixes across checkout, payment, and shopping workflows.

skills.Languages: Go, TypeScript, JavaScript, Java, Python, SQL
skills.Frontend: React, Angular, Tailwind CSS, React Native
skills.Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, Microservices, API Security

bullets: Contributed to migration of legacy payment system from JSP to Angular, implementing credit card flow using reactive forms and centralized validation logic.
Developed "Save for Later" feature in shopping cart by integrating UI, APIs, and state management using RxJS (BehaviorSubject), improving user experience.
Resolved long-standing production issue in navigation by designing a custom Angular component for "My Account" dropdown, improving usability and meeting client requirements.
Debugged and fixed cross-page data inconsistencies (store pickup, checkout, account pages) by correcting API-UI mapping and ensuring consistent data binding.
Identified and resolved complex checkout edge cases involving shipping address inconsistencies by implementing UI-level validation based on API response patterns.
Refactored product image rendering logic by centralizing conditional handling into a reusable utility service, ensuring consistency across multiple components and devices.
Improved unit test coverage from 5% to 90% by writing comprehensive Jasmine test cases, enhancing code reliability and reducing regression issues.
Reduced incident resolution time by 25% through efficient debugging and root cause analysis.
Maintained high system reliability by monitoring applications using Kibana and Dynatrace during peak traffic (10K-30K users/hour).
Designed chatbot workflows using Dialogflow integrated with Google Maps APIs.
Improved user retention through mobile-first UI optimization and push notification systems.

projects.name: CMDB: Cinematic Movie Discovery Bureau
projects.tech: React, Go, REST APIs, Reverse Proxy
bullets: Engineered a dual-stage API orchestration system integrating multiple external APIs using IMDb IDs for enriched movie metadata.
Built a Go-based reverse proxy to handle request routing, bypass API restrictions, and improve response reliability.
Designed scalable REST API interactions with optimized data fetching and caching strategies.
Implemented advanced frontend state management using React for handling multi-source data streams.
Improved application performance and reduced API latency through efficient request handling and architecture design.

projects.name: Slices Pizza
bullets: Developed full-stack e-commerce platform using React and Go with PostgreSQL.
Designed RESTful APIs with service-oriented architecture for scalable order processing.
Implemented secure data handling and efficient state management across application modules.

projects.name: Speech Evaluation System
bullets: Developed backend system for speech analysis using Python and Django.
Integrated speech-to-text APIs improving evaluation accuracy by 15%.
Built secure architecture for handling audio processing and analytics.

education.university: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University
